stories.headline: Iran continues intensified attacks across Gulf in US-Israel war fallout
stories.description: Strikes target multiple countries, including Saudi Arabia and Qatar, overnight with interceptions reported.

stories.headline: She spent 16 hours a day on Instagram. Jury to decide if Meta is to blame
stories.description: Lawsuit claims social media platforms are intentionally addictive.

stories.headline: Why do Glasgow's historic buildings keep catching fire?
stories.description: Glasgow's historic sites have been struck by a series of fires.

stories.headline: Is Dubai's glossy image under threat? Not everyone thinks so
stories.description: The city has been considered a safe haven by expats, tourists and influencers  - but that's now being tested.

stories.headline: US Embassy in Baghdad, Iraq targeted with missile, hits helipad
stories.description: The missile attack causes damage to the mission, according to sources, as smoke is seen rising from the building.
